PUBLICATIONS

Scientific Publications & Research

Explore our contributions to pharmaceutical science through peer-reviewed publications, technical reviews, and research papers. Our team is committed to advancing knowledge in pharmaceutical manufacturing and healthcare.

Research Paper2025International Journal of Pharmaceutical Sciences

Quality Assurance in GMP Pharmaceutical Manufacturing: Best Practices for Emerging Markets

Dr. Somchai Pholsena, Dr. Amy Chen

This paper examines quality assurance methodologies suitable for emerging pharmaceutical markets in Southeast Asia, proposing frameworks that balance regulatory compliance with operational efficiency.

Technical Review2025Journal of Pharmaceutical Technology

Advances in Softgel Technology for Improved Bioavailability

Research Team at Raysun Biopharma

A comprehensive review of recent advances in softgel encapsulation technology, focusing on formulations that enhance drug bioavailability and patient compliance.

Sustainability Report2024Green Chemistry in Pharmacy

Sustainable Pharmaceutical Manufacturing: Reducing Environmental Impact

Dr. Keo Souvannakhot

Strategies for implementing sustainable manufacturing practices in pharmaceutical production, with case studies from ASEAN-based manufacturers.

Research Paper2024Pediatric Pharmaceuticals

Pediatric Formulations: Challenges and Solutions in Drug Development

Dr. Sarah Chen, Dr.Phonekeo Thongsavanh

Addressing the unique challenges of developing child-friendly pharmaceutical formulations, including taste masking, dosing accuracy, and acceptability.

Guide2024Pharmaceutical Regulatory Journal

Regulatory Pathways for Pharmaceutical Products in ASEAN Markets

Regulatory Affairs Team

A practical guide for navigating regulatory requirements across ASEAN member states, facilitating market access for pharmaceutical manufacturers.

Research Paper2024International Journal of Antimicrobial Agents

Antibiotic Stewardship in Manufacturing: Quality Control Perspectives

Quality Assurance Team

Quality control approaches to ensure antibiotic potency and safety while supporting global efforts to combat antimicrobial resistance.

Technical Report2023Pharmaceutical Stability

Stability Studies for Tropical Climate Pharmaceutical Storage

Dr. Vongphachanh Khamsay

Guidelines for conducting stability studies appropriate for products destined for tropical climates, addressing temperature and humidity challenges.

Perspective2023Global Health: Science and Practice

Building Pharmaceutical Manufacturing Capacity in Least Developed Countries

Executive Team

A perspective on building sustainable pharmaceutical manufacturing capabilities in LDCs, drawing from our experience in Laos.

Stay Informed

Subscribe to our newsletter to receive updates on new publications and research breakthroughs.
